on_screen_text: 3000 రూపాయల English Coaching class పనికిరాకుండా పోయినప్పుడు. [When the 3000 rupees English Coaching class goes to waste.] MySivi యాప్ లో AI టీచర్ తో చాటింగ్ చేస్తే English నేర్చుకోవడం మొదలు! [When you start learning English by chatting with an AI teacher on the MySivi app!]
summary: A split-screen meme ad contrasting the failure of expensive English coaching with the success of learning via the MySivi app. It uses movie clips of actor Allu Arjun to show disappointment versus celebration, promoting MySivi's AI chatting feature.
